narrative:
Hicksville Village B (precinct in Defiance County) has 819 registered voters, with 65.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points.
